mapper.insert:
insert into comment(co_po_num, co_me_id, co_content, co_num, co_ori_num) select #{comment.co_po_num},#{comment.co_me_id},#{comment.co_content}, ifnull(max(co_num), 0) + 1,
ifnull(max(co_num), 0) + 1
#{comment.co_ori_num}
from comment
mapper.select: select * from comment where co_po_num = #{criteria.po_num} order by co_ori_num desc, co_num limit #{criteria.pageStart}, #{criteria.perPageNum}
select count(*) from comment where co_po_num = #{criteria.po_num}
mapper.update: update comment set co_del = "Y" where co_num=#{co_num}
mapper.select: select * from comment where co_num = #{co_num} and co_del = 'N'
mapper.update: update comment set co_content = #{comment.co_content} where co_num = #{comment.co_num}
